title: polygala verticillata
intro: Polygala verticillata, also known as American jointweed, is a perennial herb in the milkwort family (Polygalaceae) native to North America. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Polygala verticillata include its potential to support the immune system, reduce inflammation, and aid in the treatment of various health conditions such as fever, sore throat, and respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Polygala verticillata include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to extract its medicinal compounds and provide relief from various health complaints.
